key.name: mute-hotkey
key.description: Keyboard shortcut (GTK accelerator syntax) that toggles mute on every microphone source at once. Empty list disables the shortcut.

key.name: manage-gsd-mic-mute
key.summary: Take over the built-in mic-mute shortcut
key.description: Clear gnome-settings-daemon's mic-mute shortcut on enable and restore it on disable, so this extension's all-microphones handler is the only thing bound to the combo. Takes effect the next time the extension is enabled.

key.name: saved-gsd-mic-mute
key.summary: Saved value of the built-in mic-mute shortcut
key.description: Internal: the original gnome-settings-daemon mic-mute value, saved before it was cleared so it can be restored. Do not edit manually.

key.name: gsd-mic-mute-overridden
key.summary: Whether the built-in mic-mute shortcut is currently overridden
key.description: Internal: true while this extension has cleared the built-in mic-mute shortcut. Persisted so a crash does not unbalance save/restore. Do not edit manually.
